[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011001 3
1 1111000 4
2 1001100 3
3 1000000 1
4 1100110 4
5 0100010 2
6 1100110 4
7 1111111 a

01 10 0100010 2 match 5
12 21 1100110 4 match 4 6
23 32 1111111 a match 7
34 43 1111001 5
45 54 1111100 5
56 65 1001100 3 match 2
67 76 1000100 2
70 07 1100110 4 match 4 6

13 31 0011011 4
24 42 1111110 6
35 53 1011101 5
46 64 1111000 4 match 1
57 75 1001100 3 match 2

71 17 1000110 3

47 74 1111100 5
50 05 1101110 5
61 16 1000010 2
72 27 1100110 4 match 4 6

37 73 1011101 5
